beIN SPORTS 7.title_fr: Tiago Torres (POR) contre Hugo Gaston (FRA) - ATP 250 Millennium Estoril Open 2026
beIN SPORTS 7.desc_en: The Millennium Estoril Open 2026 marks the tournament’s return to ATP 250 status in Portugal, running from 20 to 26 July in Estoril. Played on clay, it stands as the country’s only ATP Tour event, bringing international players to one of Portugal’s leading tennis stages.
beIN SPORTS 7.desc_fr: Le Millennium Estoril Open 2026 marque le retour du tournoi au statut ATP 250 au Portugal, qui se déroulera du 20 au 26 juillet à Estoril.
